ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-16-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-16-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-06-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIRST SELECT, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CACERES, OLIVA B $3,270.08 PRINCIPAL, $94.07 INTEREST, $136.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,500.15, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
